claim_boundary: Post-guard suite output reached 100% without a failure traceback for the 15 job-9858988 LiCCA residue nodes, but the pytest process did not exit; this is diagnostic closure evidence, not a successful full-suite gate.

post_guard_probe.scope: repository full test suite with the LiCCA/shared-HPC guard marker enabled

exit.reason: manual SIGTERM after pytest reached 100% and then produced no new output while a nested pytest child remained alive

process_snapshot.ptrace_stack_capture: unavailable: host ptrace policy blocked gdb attach

comparison_to_job_9858988.post_guard_environment_conditional_failu: not established; no failure traceback appeared, but full-suite process exit was blocked by teardown hang
comparison_to_job_9858988.residual_blocker: Identify and close the post-100% nested pytest teardown hang before treating the LiCCA full-suite row as green.

artifact_policy.raw_snapshots: local-only debugging inputs; not committed and not a durable dependency
